params.name: A' Design Award
params.description: This award is supported by the International Industrial Design Association and the Italian Industrial Design Association, recognized as an important award in the international design community. It aims to discover and recognize the most outstanding designs, technologies, and creativity worldwide, providing an international platform for showcasing winners, encouraging designers, institutions, and brands to create more high-quality products, projects, and services, promoting social development and …
